eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Indiana; at 03:59 PM ON MAR 29, 2026 Effective until 04:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Indiana EAS System. This test is conducted in coordination with the Indiana Broadcasters as a public service to the citizens of Indiana.
